body.title: Containerize Igor — Docker compose (Linux/Mac)
body.result: Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml + deploy/igor-docker.sh. Python 3.12-slim base, playwright Chromium, NLTK. Compose: igor + postgres:16-alpine + ollama/ollama. igor waits for postgres healthy, shm_size=2g for browser_use, runtime volume at /data. igor-docker.sh: up/down/logs/rebuild/pull-model/status. Native ~/bin/igor launcher unchanged.
body.description: D235. Build Docker compose stack: Igor service (Python 3.12, wild_igor/, pip install requirements) + Postgres service + Ollama sibling. Volume: ~/.TheIgors → /data inside container. Entrypoint: python -m igor.main. Env: IGOR_RUNTIME_ROOT=/data. Chrome browser_use: --shm-size=2g in compose. D232 startup scripts become thin docker run wrappers. Windows path (native ps1) is separate ticket. Output: Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml + updated igor launcher script.
